title: Two Tornadoes Touched Down at the Exact Same Time
script: Two tornadoes dropped out of the same storm at the exact same time and started spinning side by side. Drivers pulled over and filmed as the twin funnels tore across open fields, close enough that they looked like they might merge into one. It's rare but real; a single powerful storm can spin up multiple tornadoes at once when the winds inside it wrap around each other. Sometimes a smaller twister even orbits the bigger one before getting swallowed up. Forecasters call these the most dangerous storms because the second funnel often hides behind the first. So where are you supposed to run when there are two?
